display.purpose: Main headers, section titles, and key branding moments.

body.purpose: Secondary descriptions, product labels, lists, and form labels.

shadows.name: Interactive Rise
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus elevation feedback for interactive cards and components.

motion.name: Spring Default
motion.purpose: Soft organic ease-out for hover transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button, Forest Ink background.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #13382B; color: #FAF9F6; border-radius: 24px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(28 30 27 / 0.05); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #0E2C22; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #13382B; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Secondary or promotional call to action button, Terracotta Orange background.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { background-color: #E05E2B; color: #FAF9F6; border-radius: 24px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(28 30 27 / 0.05); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background-color: #C64F20; } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E05E2B; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-accent:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input, flat parchment style with sandstone border.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; px-3; py-2; background-color: #FAF9F6; border: 1px solid #E8E4DA; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 14px; color: #1C1E1B; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #13382B; background-color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(19, 56, 43, 0.1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9E9582; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Artisanal product card container, flat border at rest rising on hover.
components.html:
Organic Valley

Fresh Organic Blueberries

$4.99
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E8E4DA; border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 220px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(28 30 27 / 0.05); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #D6D0C2; transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(28 30 27 / 0.08), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(28 30 27 / 0.05); } .ds-card-img-placeholder { aspect-ratio: 4/3; background-color: #FAF9F6; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-brand { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #9E9582; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #1C1E1B; margin: 0 0 8px 0; line-height: 1.4; height: 34px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid #FAF9F6; } .ds-card-price { font-family: monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #1C1E1B; } .ds-btn-sm { padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 11px; border-radius: 16px; }

narrative.overview: FreshCart fuses the warm authenticity of a physical neighborhood farmers' market with the high-efficiency expectations of modern web delivery. Rather than using sterile, tech-first layouts or overused SaaS aesthetics, the design system focuses on raw organic textures, warm-toned typography contrast, and high-density, legible data surfaces. The system explicitly rejects SaaS generic patterns, neon gradients, glassmorphism, side-stripe borders, and all forms of artificial scaffolding.
keyCharacteristics: Warm Contrast: Deep organic green text and backgrounds resting on soft, natural off-white papers.
Typographic Axis: Bold display serif headers paired with clean, geometric body type.
Flat at Rest: Surfaces are flat and layered. Elevation is used sparingly, primarily as an active state response to user hover or focus.
Tactile Inputs: Inputs and buttons feature generously rounded corners, solid borders, and clear micro-interactions.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary accent, Terracotta Sunrise (#E05E2B), must occupy <=10% of any given screen. Its role is strictly to guide the user's attention to critical status updates, active selections, or promotional alerts.

rules.name: The Tinted Ink Rule
rules.body: Text must never use a generic pure black (#000000) or high-contrast cool grey. Body copy must always use Charcoal Ink (#1C1E1B) to preserve the organic visual warmth of the design.

rules.name: The Widow Prevention Rule
rules.body: All Display and Headline headings must use text-wrap: balance to prevent awkward single-word lines. Body elements must use text-wrap: pretty for clean margins.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All surfaces (cards, buttons, inputs) must rest flat at their default state. Shadows are prohibited at rest and must only appear as a micro-interaction feedback response to user hover or focus.

dos: Do check contrast ratios for body text and placeholders against tinted backgrounds (target >= 4.5:1).
Do wrap SVGs and set aria-hidden="true" on decorative icons inside buttons and navigation.
Do assign explicit HTML width and height dimensions to all images to prevent layout shift (CLS).
Do use native buttons and links (<button>, <a>, <Link>) with focus-ring styles rather than generic divs.
Do specify descriptive autocompletes (autocomplete="cc-name", autocomplete="cc-number", etc.) for payment and checkout form inputs.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right side-stripes greater than 1px as color accents on alert cards.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip text configurations.
Don't apply frosted-glassmorphism or blurs decoratively as standard card backgrounds.
Don't use tiny, uppercase wide-tracked Kickers/Eyebrows above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers unless they denote a strict sequence.
Don't use double-nested cards or containers.
